{{Item
| image = Cape coloured.png
| id = cape_coloured
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Cape''' is a dyable equipable material that makes your dog look nice.

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Strings <br>+ Leather <br>+ Wool
| [[File:Cape coloured crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}

== Used In ==
* [[Death Hood]]
* [[Beastars's Female Uniform]]
* [[Pianist Suit]]
== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original DT, named '''Colored Cape''' but later changed to '''Cape'''.
* The original crafting recipe initially used 6 leather but then later replaced by 3 leather and 3 wool.
